description: The AI surfaces the governance signals slowing the audit — reconciliation breaks, CFO-versus-Lending parity gaps, and missing lineage — before you ask, correlating across the Jack Henry core, the Thought Machine ledger, the GL, and the Audit / GRC system.

Ask why your loan-loss number does not match Lending in plain language. The AI pulls from core, the ledger, origination, and the warehouse simultaneously and reconciles them to one governed figure in a single answer.

Maps where the audit gets stuck: which figures require manual reconciliation, which reports lack lineage, and where information is not reaching the right people — and quantifies the staff hours the disconnect is costing.

Forecasts audit completion and remediation timelines, models the staff-hour and close-cycle impact of fixing the data flow, and projects governed reporting readiness for the next NCUA 5300 examination.

Flags the parity break itself: where the same metric diverges across systems, where a transformation silently changes a figure between the ledger and Tableau, and which reconciliation exceptions are aging.

Executes governance actions: generate the lineage-backed audit evidence package, reconcile divergent figures to a single governed number, route the right data to the right role, and draft the data-governance remediation plan.
